security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:3000 ws://localhost:3000 https: wss:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http://localhost:3000; media-src 'self' blob: data: https: http://localhost:3000; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: The warm, free place for your group chat.
bundle.longDescription: Kikkacord is a free, open Discord alternative — voice, video, 4K screen-share, polls, events, roles, and plugins, with nothing locked behind a paywall.
